Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect.AbstractDialect

Packages that use AbstractDialect
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect
JDBC-specific Dialect implementations.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.dialect
Dialects abstract the SQL dialect of the underlying database.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect
Dialects abstract the SQL dialect of the underlying database.
